zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London於1364年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯時，他的父親Thomas Chicheley29歲，母親Agnes Pyncheon24歲。他於1384年與Beatrix Barrett在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年7月20日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London于1364年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯时，他的父亲Thomas Chicheley29岁，母亲Agnes Pyncheon24岁。他于1384年与Beatrix Barrett在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1427年7月20日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London was born in 1364, in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Chicheley, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Pyncheon, was 24. He married Beatrix Barrett in 1384, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 July 1427, in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London est né en 1364, à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Chicheley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Pyncheon, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix Barrett en 1384, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1427, à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of Londonが1364年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズで生まれた時，父Thomas Chicheleyは29歳，母Agnes Pyncheonは24歳であった。1384年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでBeatrix Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1427年7月20日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London(이)가 1364년 영국 노르섬프토실르 히아 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Chicheley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Pyncheon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1384년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Beatrix Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 7월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 히아 페레르스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 히아 페레르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London nasceu em 1364, em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Chicheley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Pyncheon, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Barrett em 1384, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1427, em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London родился в 1364 г. в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Chicheley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Pyncheon, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Barrett в 1384 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 июля 1427 г. в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London nació en 1364, en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Chicheley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Pyncheon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Beatrix Barrett en 1384, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1427, en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
